about.metaDesc: Learn about the history, mission, vision and leadership of the Vietnam Agarwood Association.
about.heroDesc: A professional social organization representing the community of businesses, manufacturers, and agarwood enthusiasts nationwide.
about.historyContent: The Vietnam Agarwood Association (abbreviated: VAWA) was established on January 11, 2010 under Decision No. 23/QD-BNV of the Ministry of Home Affairs. The Association's charter was approved under Decision No. 688/QD-BNV dated June 23, 2010, and amended under Decision No. 1086/QD-BNV dated December 29, 2023. Currently operating in its 3rd term (2023–2028), the Association continues to expand its member network, develop industry standards, and bring Vietnamese agarwood to the international market.
about.missionContent: Connecting agarwood businesses nationwide, standardizing product quality, and building a transparent certification system. We accompany our members in developing brands, expanding markets, and enhancing the value of Vietnamese agarwood on the international stage.
about.visionContent: To become the most reputable agarwood organization in Southeast Asia by 2030. The Vietnam Agarwood Association aims to build a sustainable agarwood industry ecosystem where every business has the opportunity to grow and contribute to the shared prosperity of the industry.
about.benefit1Desc: Receive an official certification badge from the Association, affirming product quality in the market.
about.benefit2Desc: Your business is prominently listed in the public member directory on the website.
about.benefit3Desc: Access the members-only internal forum for sharing experiences and industry information.
about.benefit4Desc: Enjoy special discounts when using the Association's media service packages.
about.benefit5Desc: Expand business relationships with hundreds of agarwood businesses nationwide.
about.benefit6Desc: Receive internal newsletters and stay updated on the latest policies and trends in the agarwood industry.
about.orgChartSubtitle: According to Article 12 of the Association Charter (amended) 2023
about.ctaDesc: Register as a member today and grow the Vietnamese agarwood industry together.
